prompt: An autumn park with golden and red maple trees lining a gravel path. Scattered maple leaves cover the ground in warm orange and red. A wooden bench sits under a large maple tree on the right side. A small pond reflecting autumn colors and a footbridge are visible in the background. Soft warm afternoon light. Ahead past the footbridge, a gazebo with a copper weathervane stands on the far bank of the pond. To the right beyond the bench, a stone drinking fountain and a wrought-iron lamp post mark a path junction. To the left, a garden bed of chrysanthemums in yellow and burgundy borders a low stone wall, and a squirrel perches on a gnarled tree root. First-person viewer. First-person view at eye level looking down the leaf-strewn gravel path toward the pond and footbridge. No held objects.

tracking_object.desc: wooden bench under the maple tree on the right

scene_adherence.visible_part: An autumn park with golden and red maple trees lining a gravel path. Scattered maple leaves cover the ground in warm orange and red. A wooden bench sits under a large maple tree on the right side. A small pond reflecting autumn colors and a footbridge are visible in the background. Soft warm afternoon light covers the scene.

To the right beyond the bench, a stone drinking fountain and a wrought-iron lamp post mark a path junction. To the left, a garden bed of chrysanthemums in yellow and burgundy borders a low stone wall, and a squirrel perches on a gnarled tree root.
